source_name: Egaroucid v0002 local sequence transcript training data
license_or_terms: Custom terms published by Egaroucid: free use for own Othello AI activities; raw data redistribution is prohibited.
required_attribution: Attribution is requested but not required by the published terms; cite Egaroucid training data and https://www.egaroucid.nyanyan.dev/ja/technology/train-data/ when used.
notes: Manifest-only local corpus reference for sequence/transcript data. Keep raw zips, generated normalized TSVs, local run reports, datasets, weights, and artifacts under ignored local paths. Labels produced by the importer are final-disc-difference labels derived from transcript final boards, not teacher-search labels.
